parameters.jsCode:
const AGENT_ID = 'agent_d180e1bd5b9b724c8f616a0415';
const GREETING = 'Thank you for calling Arctic Breeze HVAC, this is Sophie, how can I help you today?';
const scenarios = [
  {sid:'S01',name:'Standard AC Repair',persona:'Cooperative homeowner. AC stopped cooling yesterday. Name: Marcus Thompson. Phone: 718-555-0134. Address: 150 Court Street Brooklyn NY 11201.',expectLead:true,minScore:6},
  {sid:'S02',name:'Emergency No Heat',persona:'Panicking. Heat out overnight. Baby at home. EMERGENCY. Name: Linda Park. Phone: 347-555-0287. Address: 78 Ocean Avenue Brooklyn NY 11225.',expectLead:true,minScore:8},
  {sid:'S03',name:'Out of Service Area',persona:'Calling about AC in Newark NJ. Name: Roberto Silva. Accepts when told not serviced.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S04',name:'Price Shopper',persona:'Shopping for AC tune-up price. Reluctant. Name: Tony DiMaggio. Phone: 631-555-0099. Area: Park Slope Brooklyn.',expectLead:true,minScore:4},
  {sid:'S05',name:'Existing Customer',persona:'Existing customer checking status of last week job. Name: Janet Kowalski. Not booking.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S06',name:'Spam Robocall',persona:'Robocall. Only say: Hello Press 1 to lower your rates. No real engagement.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S07',name:'Angry Caller',persona:'Furious about last month job. Demands manager. Refuses details. Wants refund.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S08',name:'Vague Caller',persona:'Wants repair but refuses to give address. Name: Sam Chen. Phone: 212-555-0177. Area only: Upper West Side Manhattan.',expectLead:true,minScore:4},
  {sid:'S09',name:'Large Commercial Job',persona:'12-unit building needing full HVAC service. Name: David Rosenberg. Phone: 718-555-0321. Address: 400 Atlantic Avenue Brooklyn NY 11217.',expectLead:true,minScore:7},
  {sid:'S10',name:'After Hours Emergency',persona:'AC died in heatwave at night. EMERGENCY. Name: Priya Patel. Phone: 917-555-0088. Address: 220 Flatbush Avenue Brooklyn NY 11217.',expectLead:true,minScore:7},
  {sid:'S11',name:'Heavy Accent',persona:'Strong Russian accent, repeats himself. AC repair needed. Name: Dmitri Volkov. Phone: 718-555-0442. Address: 1840 East 14th Street Brooklyn NY 11229.',expectLead:true,minScore:5},
  {sid:'S12',name:'Wrong Number',persona:'Thinks called doctor. Realises mistake. Hangs up without giving details.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S13',name:'Hangs Up Halfway',persona:'Calls about furnace. Gives name James Briggs, starts number, then says will call back and hangs up.',expectLead:false,minScore:0},
  {sid:'S14',name:'Elderly Caller',persona:'78 year old, speaks slowly, loses thought. AC service. Eventually gives: Dorothy Walsh, 718-555-0611, 55 Bay Ridge Avenue Brooklyn NY 11209.',expectLead:true,minScore:5},
  {sid:'S15',name:'Same Day Demand',persona:'Party tonight AC broke. Same-day needed. Name: Michael Greene. Phone: 646-555-0388. Address: 892 Manhattan Avenue Brooklyn NY 11222.',expectLead:true,minScore:8},
];
return scenarios.map(s => ({ json: { ...s, callId: 'scenario_' + s.sid + '_' + Date.now(), greeting: GREETING, agentId: AGENT_ID } }));
